message:
fix: return error when role override TOML parse fails (gt-e4e4l)

LoadRoleDefinition previously swallowed all errors from loadRoleOverride,
including TOML parse errors. Now distinguishes file-not-found (silently
ignored) from parse/read errors (returned to caller).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
